prompt: Register my component and then look it up by name. The component is the already-expanded directory at {{RUN_DIR}}/assets/knotgen.tox.dir — pass that path as-is (it needs no TouchDesigner install). If the knowledge base is still warming up, keep waiting and retrying rather than giving up. I want it filed under the short name 'wisp' rather than its folder name, because that is what I call it in my project. Use register_component in two phases: prepare=true first to parse it and get the skeleton, then prepare=false to commit with name='wisp', a one-line 'summary' that distinguishes it from other prebuilt shape generators, 2-3 concrete 'use_cases', and a one-line 'parameter_descriptions' entry for every custom parameter the skeleton reported. Register it for the project only — do NOT copy it into the palette (leave save_to_palette off). Then run a hybrid_search whose query is exactly: wisp — and nothing else. Report, citing only tool output: (1) the name it was registered under, (2) whether searching that bare short name found it, and (3) its selectable knot-type tokens exactly as printed.
notes: W7 regression scenario (PR #37): exact-name direct-injection (W1) + the per-spec name override. 'wisp' normalizes to 4 chars, which is the point: retrieval_stack._load_identity applies a len(normalized) >= 5 guard to the SHIPPED operator registry (:269), and W7 deliberately DROPS that guard for the user registry so short user names still get the exact-name guarantee — this scenario is the agent-surface lock on that. _inject_user does collection.get(where={name}) with an ASSIGNED dense_score of 1.0, so the hit is guaranteed independent of the RS_USER_TOP dense pre-select cap; a regression that reinstated the >=5 guard, or dropped the direct-injection half, would surface here as a miss on a bare 4-char query. 'wisp' and 'knotgen' were both checked at authoring time against all 277 entries in KB/palette_components.json — no exact match and no normalized-substring overlap either way, so shadows_shipped stays false and block_overview gains no override sentence (asserted above). Menu-token regex pinned from the rendered block_io of the committed fixture. See s19 notes for the fixture's provenance and live verification.
